ksa_text: Ability to define business use cases for AI systems, assess their value and alignment with organizational mission, and evaluate whether implementations achieve intended purpose and measurable benefits.

pass_2_evaluation.rationale: Included: ability maps directly to AI Governance Professional scope — GOV-specific signals detected ("ai assess", "ai system   :review|assess|audit|govern"). STRM composite is minimal (0.0000 — likely framework vocabulary mismatch). Domain AI Governance (affinity 0.90) is a natural fit for this governance role. Seniority is appropriate for manager-level level.

pass_4_adversarial_external.challenge: External check: no matches in governance job postings or certification curricula (CDMP, DAMA, IAPP CIPP/CIPM, NIST AI RMF, ISO 42001). Would a working AI Governance Professional self-report this as a required competency?
pass_4_adversarial_external.evidence: Challenge answered: the governance competency is implicit in AI Governance Professional practice (domain affinity 0.90, 2 GOV signal(s)). Framework vocabulary matching underrepresents many legitimate governance competencies.
